Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 62 

PHRMCY_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Pharmacy Services Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the other pharmacy provider category; ever 
in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: PHRMCY_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: PHRMCY_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS
